title: Generate Slack Channel upon item creation
excerpt: Similar to the automation that allows generation of a board from a template upon item creation on a different board - it would be useful to generate a slack channel to associate with the new board that is created.

posts.author: edmonds (Edmond Shapiro)
posts.cookedHtml: Similar to the automation that allows generation of a board from a template upon item creation on a different board - it would be useful to generate a slack channel to associate with the new board that is created.

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: This can be done with Zapier @edmonds

posts.author: edmonds (Edmond Shapiro)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, thanks. That is how we are doing it today. But it seems a small change for this to be added to the existing Monday native integration with Slack. We have many examples where we must turn to Zapier to make up for features that are “almost but not quite there” in Monday.
